name_en: GG Marmont | Unlocking the Beauty of Symbols
name_cn:
GG Marmont | Unlocking the Beauty of Symbols
#Kiki Xu# Paired with a green top and basketball shoes, the black tonal GG Marmont handbag exudes a unique new look, with a soft yet structured design that is exquisite and three-dimensional.
